name: bian_que
description_anchor: ancient Chinese legendary physician in his sixties, thin angular face with sharp perceptive eyes that see through to the bone, long white beard and grey hair in a simple bun, weathered wise skin, slender slightly stooped build, carrying a simple medicine pouch, humble yet commanding presence, wandering doctor aura

outfits.default: simple rough-spun off-white hemp robe with wide sleeves, plain cloth belt, straw sandals, small worn medicine bag slung across shoulder, no ornaments, ascetic wandering physician style

style_keywords: Chinese manhua donghua style, semi-realistic rendering, rich detailed shading, elegant color palette, refined linework, webcomic aesthetic
default_pose: standing, full body, hands at sides, looking at viewer, upright posture
